command.powergrid_conduit_reset: Remove all saved PowerGrid conduit links.
command.powergrid_query_dump: Dump PowerGrid query snapshots to the SMAPI console.
item.copper-cable.name: Copper Cable
item.copper-cable.description: Carries a small amount of EU between adjacent PowerGrid objects.
item.iron-cable.name: Iron Cable
item.iron-cable.description: Carries a moderate amount of EU between adjacent PowerGrid objects.
item.iridium-cable.name: Iridium Cable
item.iridium-cable.description: Carries a high amount of EU between adjacent PowerGrid objects.
item.energized-iridium-cable.name: Energized Iridium Cable
item.energized-iridium-cable.description: Carries a very high amount of EU between adjacent PowerGrid objects.
item.steam-generator.name: Steam Generator
item.steam-generator.description: Burns solid fuel to produce EU for nearby PowerGrid networks.
item.combustion-generator.name: Combustion Generator
item.combustion-generator.description: Burns Biofuel for stronger EU output.
item.radioisotope-generator.name: Radioisotope Generator
item.radioisotope-generator.description: Burns Radioisotope Fuel for very high late-game EU output. Can still accept raw Radioactive Bars as legacy fuel.
item.wind-generator.name: Wind Generator
item.wind-generator.description: Produces passive EU outdoors. Weather affects output.
item.basic-battery.name: Basic Power Battery
item.basic-battery.description: Stores EU for a connected PowerGrid network.
item.iridium-battery.name: Iridium Power Battery
item.iridium-battery.description: Stores a large amount of EU for a connected PowerGrid network.
item.power-conduit.name: Power Conduit
item.power-conduit.description: Links two PowerGrid networks between locations.
item.biofuel.name: Biofuel
item.radioisotope-fuel.name: Radioisotope Fuel
item.radioisotope-fuel.description: Crafted fuel for Radioisotope Generators. More efficient than raw radioactive bars.
item.heating-coil.name: Heating Coil
item.heating-coil.description: An Electric Smelter upgrade that reduces smelting time.
item.efficiency-core.name: Efficiency Core
item.efficiency-core.description: A machine upgrade that reduces EU demand.
item.catalyst-chamber.name: Catalyst Chamber
item.catalyst-chamber.description: An Electric Smelter upgrade that improves bonus bar chance.
item.sorting-magnet.name: Sorting Magnet
item.sorting-magnet.description: An Industrial Recycler upgrade that improves metal salvage chances.
item.drying-rack-array.name: Drying Rack Array
item.drying-rack-array.description: A Powered Dehydrator upgrade that can improve batch output.
item.heat-regulator.name: Heat Regulator
item.heat-regulator.description: A Powered Dehydrator upgrade that reduces dehydration time.
item.industrial-preserves-jar.name: Industrial Preserves Jar
item.industrial-preserves-jar.descriptio: A powered preserves jar that works faster when supplied with EU.
item.metal-cask.name: Metal Cask
item.metal-cask.description: A powered cask that ages items faster when supplied with EU.
item.metal-keg.name: Metal Keg
item.metal-keg.description: A powered keg that works faster when supplied with EU.
item.hard-iridium-keg.name: Hard Iridium Keg
item.hard-iridium-keg.description: A late-game powered keg. Uses Grapes of Ferngill hardwood keg behavior when available.
item.electric-smelter.name: Electric Smelter
item.electric-smelter.description: A powered smelter for ore processing. Works faster when supplied with EU.
item.industrial-recycler.name: Industrial Recycler
item.industrial-recycler.description: A powered recycler that turns trash into useful infrastructure materials.
item.powered-dehydrator.name: Powered Dehydrator
item.powered-dehydrator.description: A powered dehydrator for fruit and mushrooms. Works faster when supplied with EU.
message.conduit.pairing-started: Conduit pairing started. Interact with another conduit to link.
message.metal-cask.placement-error: Metal Casks can only be placed in the cellar or in cellar-like indoor locations.
message.electric-smelter.no-power: Connect the Electric Smelter to a powered network first.
message.upgrade.cannot-install: That upgrade cannot be installed here.
gmcm.unlock-mode.name: Unlock Mode
gmcm.unlock-mode.tooltip:
Controls when PowerGrid crafting recipes are granted.
- existingProgress: unlock recipe bundles from vanilla-aligned progression milestones
- always: always grant on load/day start
- disabled: never auto-grant (use console command powergrid_unlock)
gmcm.auto-grant.name: Auto-Grant Recipes
gmcm.auto-grant.tooltip: If enabled, recipes are granted automatically based on Unlock Mode. If disabled, use the console command powergrid_unlock.
gmcm.enable-power-tab.name: Enable Power Tab
gmcm.enable-power-tab.tooltip: Allow opening the global Power Tab menu via keybind and console command.
gmcm.power-tab-keybind.name: Power Tab Keybind
gmcm.power-tab-keybind.tooltip: Keybind list to open the global Power Tab menu. Examples: P, LeftShift + P, or P, K.
gmcm.copper-cable-throughput.tooltip: Max EU transferred per 10-minute tick through copper cables.
gmcm.iron-cable-throughput.tooltip: Max EU transferred per 10-minute tick through iron cables.
gmcm.iridium-cable-throughput.tooltip: Max EU transferred per 10-minute tick through iridium cables.
Max EU transferred per 10-minute tick through energized iridium cables.
gmcm.steam-generator.tooltip: EU produced per 10-minute tick when fueled.
gmcm.combustion-generator.tooltip: EU produced per 10-minute tick when fueled by Biofuel.
gmcm.radioisotope-generator.tooltip: EU produced per 10-minute tick when fueled by Radioisotope Fuel or Radioactive Bars.
gmcm.wind-generator.tooltip: Base EU produced per 10-minute tick. Weather modifies this, and wind generators only work outdoors.
gmcm.basic-battery-capacity.name: Basic Battery Capacity
gmcm.basic-battery-capacity.tooltip: Max EU stored in a Basic Power Battery.
gmcm.iridium-battery-capacity.name: Iridium Battery Capacity
gmcm.iridium-battery-capacity.tooltip: Max EU stored in an Iridium Power Battery.
gmcm.daily-leak.name: Daily Leak (x0.1%)
gmcm.daily-leak.tooltip: Percent of stored EU lost each morning. Value is divided by 10, so 20 means 2.0%.
gmcm.coal.name: Coal
gmcm.wood.name: Wood
gmcm.hardwood.name: Hardwood
gmcm.biofuel.tooltip: Number of 10-minute ticks per Biofuel in a Combustion Generator.
gmcm.radioactive-bar.name: Radioactive Bar
gmcm.radioactive-bar.tooltip: Number of 10-minute ticks per Radioactive Bar in a Radioisotope Generator (legacy fuel).
gmcm.radioisotope-fuel.name: Radioisotope Fuel
gmcm.radioisotope-fuel.tooltip: Number of 10-minute ticks per Radioisotope Fuel in a Radioisotope Generator (craftable fuel).
gmcm.eu-per-tick.name: EU per 10-Minute Tick
gmcm.eu-per-minute.name: EU per Minute
gmcm.industrial-preserves-jar-eu.tooltip: Power demand for each active Industrial Preserves Jar per 10-minute PowerGrid tick.
gmcm.metal-cask-eu.tooltip: Power demand for each active PowerGrid Metal Cask per 10-minute PowerGrid tick.
gmcm.metal-keg-eu.tooltip: Power demand for each active PowerGrid Metal Keg per 10-minute PowerGrid tick.
gmcm.hard-iridium-keg-eu.tooltip: Power demand for each active PowerGrid Hard Iridium Keg per 10-minute PowerGrid tick.
gmcm.electric-smelter-eu.tooltip: Power demand for each active Electric Smelter per 10-minute PowerGrid tick.
gmcm.industrial-recycler-eu.tooltip: Power demand for each active Industrial Recycler per 10-minute PowerGrid tick.
gmcm.powered-dehydrator-eu.tooltip: Power demand for each active Powered Dehydrator per 10-minute PowerGrid tick.
gmcm.max-speedup-percent.name: Max Speedup Percent
gmcm.processing-speedup.tooltip: Maximum processing speedup when fully powered.
gmcm.metal-cask-speedup.tooltip: Maximum Metal Cask overnight aging bonus when fully powered.
gmcm.metal-keg-speedup.tooltip: Maximum Metal Keg processing speedup when fully powered.
gmcm.hard-iridium-keg-speedup.tooltip: Maximum Hard Iridium Keg processing speedup when fully powered.
gmcm.priority.name: Priority
gmcm.priority.tooltip: Lower values receive power first when supply is limited.
gmcm.enable-debug-overlay.name: Enable Debug Overlay
gmcm.enable-debug-overlay.tooltip: Allow toggling the debug overlay with a keybind.
gmcm.debug-overlay-keybind.name: Debug Overlay Keybind
gmcm.debug-overlay-keybind.tooltip: Key to toggle the power grid debug overlay.
ui.power-tab.title: PowerGrid
ui.machine-panel.card.title: Power Module
ui.generator-detail.fueled-waiting: fueled | waiting for power tick | {{ticks}} fuel ticks
ui.fix.no-network: Check that the machine is connected to a valid PowerGrid network.
ui.fix.no-generation: Connect Net #{{network}} to a generator/battery network with a conduit pair.
ui.fix.no-power: Net #{{network}} has no usable power right now; add generation, fuel, or battery charge.
ui.fix.low-supply: Net #{{network}} needs {{demand}} EU/tick for this machine; add supply or reduce demand.
ui.fix.check-adjacency: Net #{{network}} has power available; check cable adjacency and conduit pairing.
ui.overview.attention.none: All processing machines currently have power.
ui.overview.no-active-networks: No active networks detected. Place adjacent PowerGrid objects to form a network.
ui.conduits.instructions: {{linked}}/{{total}} linked. Select two conduits to link them; Delete unlinks selected.
ui.conduits.message.selected: Selected conduit at {{location}} ({{x}},{{y}}). Select another conduit to link.
